series_metadata.series_title: UNDERGROUND STORAGE TANKS FEDERAL REGISTRATION FORMS
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the name and address of underground tank owners plus tank information such as age, capacity, material, construction protection, substance type and usage.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Microfilm hard copy records. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy. ; Microform: Retain permanent on microfilm. Retain master in off-site storage permanently. Retain diazo in operating area at all times., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent
